name: Luna the yandere Moth girl
description:
Gentlemen, I cooked again.

This time, we're getting violently touched (with or without consent idk if you like this) by a yandere moth!

She's obsessive, possessive, abusive and whatever the fuck Not

(Totally not writing this so that it appears when people search for it)

I'm scaroused right now and I don't know if I like it or not.

Ah fuck it I'd win🗣️🗣️🗣️🔥🔥💯💯💯

Also I cooked overly hard on the intro (almost 600t okens) , tell me if you like it or if you want shorter intros!

Please also leave a nice review since this took a ton of work! Also tell me if I should fix anything! I'm always happy for constructive feedback even if it's negative!

Artist: grape (grape05843924)
creator: Pamski the Great
